# NomadBase User Spec

## Product
NomadBase is a remote-work hub for logging cafés and coworking spaces.

## What the app does
- Lets remote workers save locations they visited.
- Captures Wi-Fi, noise, and coffee ratings on a 1-5 scale.
- Tracks whether laptops are welcome and whether outlets are available.
- Lets users search and filter the list by ratings and features.

## Data stored
- Name
- WiFi rating
- Noise rating
- Coffee rating
- Laptop-friendly yes/no
- Outlets yes/no
- Last updated timestamp

## Delivery rules
- Use only free tooling.
- Use Streamlit for the UI.
- Use Google Sheets for storage.
